query_title: Night of the Dark Full Moon

recommendations.title: Asylum Blackout
recommendations.overview: A group of cooks at an asylum for the criminally insane get locked in with the inmates during a massive thunderstorm

recommendations.title: Eloise
recommendations.overview: Four friends break into an abandoned insane asylum in search of a death certificate which will grant one of them a large inheritance. However, finding it soon becomes the least of their worries in a place haunted by dark memories.

recommendations.title: Felidae
recommendations.overview: A domestic house cat named Francis investigates the grisly feline murders taking place in his new neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Cult of Chucky
recommendations.overview: Confined to an asylum for the criminally insane for the past four years, Nica is wrongly convinced that she, not Chucky, murdered her entire family... until a string of grisly deaths occur after her psychiatrist introduces a new group therapy tool --

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Shutter Island
recommendations.overview: World War II soldier-turned-U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels investigates the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane, but his efforts are compromised by troubling visions and a mysterious doctor.

recommendations.title: Frankenstein and the Monster from Hell

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.
